_note: Round 2 #3: {@render EXPR} now type-checks the snippet call. Pre-2026-04-26 the directive was a no-op in our emit, so typos like `undefinedSnippet` silently passed. Mirrors upstream svelte2tsx's RenderTag.ts. Positions are LSP-style 0-based (machine-verbose format). Upstream wraps the call in __sveltets_2_ensureSnippet to also assert 'is it actually a Snippet<>?'; we emit the bare call for now and may add an __svn_ensure_snippet ambient as a future refinement.
